title: Title
doc_html:
SUBPART D.  CIGARETTE FIRE SAFETY AND

FIREFIGHTER PROTECTION

§1626.  Title

This Act shall be known and may be cited as the "Cigarette Fire Safety and Firefighter Protection Act".

Acts 2007, No. 409, §1, eff. Aug. 31, 2009.
